fixes_applied.description: Added Autopilot and Pause Limits rows to Optional Sections quick-ref table
Fixed On events key in Notifications section: added pipeline-started, step-completed, pipeline-paused; fixed pipeline-complete -> pipeline-completed
Added complete ### Autopilot section with 7-key table and link to docs/guides/autopilot.md
Added complete ### Pause Limits section with Pause timeout key, defaults, valid range, and link to core/agent-states.md
Appended commented ### Autopilot and ### Pause Limits blocks to Complete Example after ### Pipeline Profiles
Added pipeline-paused row to Event Tokens table
Updated stale SSRF deferred note: --proto http,https shipped in v6.9.0; cross-run circuit breaker + URL allowlist deferred to v6.10.0
Added ### Pause Limits (optional, v6.9.0+) commented block to all 8 config templates
Fixed stale pipeline-complete -> pipeline-completed in Notifications On events example in 2 templates
Added /autopilot and /workflow-router rows to Skills table (now 29 rows)
